name: everywhere-qa
description: Audit, repair, and verify web apps across global user conditions.

interface.longDescription: Test a web app across accessibility, Arabic RTL, expanded copy, and constrained Indian mobile conditions. Let Codex repair the repository, then rerun the same checks to prove the delta.
defaultPrompt: Audit this app for users everywhere.
Fix the highest-impact barriers and verify them.
Compare this run with a Global Passport baseline.
